message.content:
At the moment we store in local storage the last chapter and page location. I'd like to make this better in a few ways:

1. I cannot navigate manually to the home page in the table of contents popup, because doing so immediately sends me back to the last location I was reading. I want to keep the auto redirect when the app first loads, but provide a way to override it when someone manually navs to it


Actually let's start with just that fix

content.thinking:
The user wants to fix an issue where navigating to the home page manually (via table of contents) immediately redirects back to the last reading location stored in localStorage. They want to keep the auto-redirect on first app load, but allow manual navigation to the home page to work.

Let me explore the codebase to understand how this works.

content.text: Let me explore the relevant code to understand how the navigation and localStorage redirect work.
